channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas GOP attorney general race Tuesday centers on Trump loyalty
item.description: Texas Republicans will decide Tuesday whether state Sen. Mayes Middleton or U.S. Rep. Chip Roy becomes the party's nominee for attorney general.

item.title: Oil-rich Alberta now preparing vote on leaving Canada
GOP senators reject Trump weaponization payouts
item.description: Despite their phone records being targeted by the Biden administration, some Republican senators reportedly decline payments from the program.

item.title: Gary Sinise reveals what drove him out of California and deeper into his life's work
